title: Zebrafish-TGBS-Supplementary
author: Ramya Kolli
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary files for sequencing and qPCR raw data containing: qPCR raw data files for the end result for male and female fish from CFX Manger version 3.0, qPCR quantification data, TGBS raw sequences and TGBS metadata file with sample information.
steps_raw: Supplementary files for sequencing and qPCR raw data containing: qPCR raw data files for the end result for male and female fish from CFX Manger version 3.0, qPCR quantification data, TGBS raw sequences and TGBS metadata file with sample information.
